revalidation_attempt_2026_04_25.notes: Could not re-run validation in this session: Bash tool is broken in this environment. Every Bash invocation (including via subagent) fails immediately with 'EACCES: permission denied, mkdir /home/worker/.claude/session-env'. The Claude Code harness cannot create its per-session env directory under /home/worker/.claude/, and writing into that directory is blocked as a sensitive-file path. No docker/build/test/judge command could be executed. Preserving prior validate=pass result; pipeline failure recorded in top-level 'error' is from rate-limited fix_quality, not from a validation regression.

p2p_enrich.notes: Enriched p2p tests with CI commands: ruff check, ruff format, python AST validation. Dockerfile has ruff pre-installed.
